research_question: Build and audit the first reproducible baseline score-to-run-state pipeline before fixed test and walk-forward.
notes: Exploratory scaffold round used to formalize the first baseline candidate and preserve attempt history. Current outcome is a weak baseline candidate rather than a promotable scheme.

research_question: Test whether removing the liquidity component from the weak baseline score reduces low-liquidity dependence and improves stability under TopK perturbation and cost stress.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that changes exactly one core dimension: remove liquidity_20d_raw from the score. Outcome remained weak after full-chain and fixed-test comparison.

research_question: Test whether removing the low-volatility component from the weak v2 challenger improves low-liquidity dependence and fixed-test stability while keeping the reversal/momentum core intact.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that changes exactly one core dimension: remove volatility_20d_raw from the v2 score. The completed run used chunk_size=300 and remained a weak candidate after fixed-test comparison.

research_question: Test whether removing the short-term reversal component from the weak v3 challenger reduces microstructure sensitivity and improves fixed-test stability while keeping medium-term momentum intact.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that changes exactly one core dimension: remove reversal_5d_raw from the v3 score. The completed run used chunk_size=100 and materially improved relative performance, but still failed low-liquidity, TopK perturbation, and cost stress audit gates.

research_question: Test whether adding low-volatility back on top of the weak momentum-only v4 scheme improves fixed-test stability without giving back too much of the v4 relative performance improvement.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that changes exactly one core dimension: add volatility_20d_raw back to the v4 score. The completed run used chunk_size=50 and improved run-state speed again, but strategy-level audit still classified the scheme as weak_candidate.

research_question: Test whether a simple liquidity guard on top of the weak momentum-only v4 scheme can materially reduce low-liquidity dependence and improve fixed-test robustness without changing the score itself.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that keeps the v4 score fixed and changes exactly one core dimension: add a liquidity guard to ranking eligibility. The completed run used chunk_size=10 and improved relative performance, but strategy-level audit still classified the scheme as weak_candidate.

research_question: Test whether strengthening the liquidity guard on top of the weak v6 momentum-only guarded scheme can further reduce low-liquidity dependence and improve fixed-test robustness without changing the score itself.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that keeps the v4 momentum-only score fixed and changes exactly one core dimension: strengthen the liquidity guard threshold from 0.50 to 0.70. The completed run used signal_date_chunk_size=5 as an engineering-only experiment and improved relative performance versus v6, but strategy-level audit still classified the scheme as weak_candidate.

research_question: Test whether moving the same 0.70 liquidity guard from ranking eligibility to the effective universe boundary can further reduce low-liquidity dependence and improve fixed-test robustness without changing the score itself.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that keeps the v4 momentum-only score fixed and changes exactly one core dimension: move the same liquidity guard threshold from ranking eligibility to the effective universe boundary. The completed run used signal_date_chunk_size=8 as an engineering-only experiment and produced effectively identical strategy results to v7, so the scheme remains weak_candidate.

research_question: Test whether keeping the weak-but-best v7 selection contract fixed while applying one predefined liquidity-sensitive weight penalty inside the same TopK can reduce low-liquidity dependence and improve fixed-test robustness without changing the selected names themselves.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that freezes the v7 score and 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, and changes exactly one core dimension: map the same selected TopK names to target weights through one fixed linear liquidity penalty formula. The completed run kept signal_date_chunk_size=5, but the strategy remained a weak_candidate after fixed-test comparison against v7.

research_question: Test whether freezing the recalibrated v7 score and 0.70 ranking liquidity guard while replacing the hard equal-weight Top10 slice with one fixed rank-decay top-slice extraction can harvest the weak momentum edge more robustly and reduce perturbation sensitivity.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that freezes the recalibrated v7 signal and guard contract, and changes exactly one core dimension: the mapping from rank positions to target weights inside the same selected Top10. No score, guard, execution, benchmark, or cost changes are allowed inside this round.

research_question: Test whether freezing the recalibrated v7 score and 0.70 ranking liquidity guard while replacing full daily Top10 refresh with one fixed incumbent-retention rule can preserve more weak momentum edge after costs without changing score, guard, TopK width, or execution semantics.
notes: Exploratory challenger round that freezes the recalibrated v7 signal and guard contract, and changes exactly one core dimension: the rule for when an existing holding is retained versus replaced. No score, guard, execution, benchmark, cost, or extraction-formula changes are allowed inside this round.

research_question: Test whether a fixed quality/profitability score family built from PIT fundamentals can provide thicker gross edge and better fixed-test robustness than the calibrated v7 momentum family while keeping the operational contract unchanged.
notes: Exploratory quality/profitability family round completed one full-chain run. The candidate reduced drawdown and turnover relative to recalibrated v7, but annual_relative_return was slightly worse and both TopK perturbation and cost-stress audit gates remained failing.

research_question: Test whether a fixed price/volume multisignal score family built from the mature bars-derived feature layer can provide thicker gross edge and better fixed-test robustness than the calibrated v7 momentum family while keeping the operational contract unchanged.
notes: Exploratory price/volume multisignal family round completed one full-chain run. The candidate substantially reduced low-liquidity exposure but materially worsened annual_relative_return, relative_ir, and drawdown relative to recalibrated v7, while both TopK perturbation and cost-stress audit gates remained failing.

research_question: Test whether a directionally aligned trend-quality price/volume score family can provide thicker gross edge and better fixed-test robustness than the calibrated v7 momentum family while keeping the operational contract unchanged.
notes: Exploratory trend-quality price/volume family round completed one full-chain run. The candidate modestly improved drawdown and turnover relative to recalibrated v7, but annual_relative_return and relative_ir remained slightly worse, and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates remained failing.

research_question: Before designing any new mixed score family, which individual price-volume signals show genuinely positive cross-sectional edge under the calibrated v7 operational contract, and which ones should be eliminated before family construction?
notes: Discovery-oriented round that freezes the calibrated v7 operational contract and evaluates one atomic price-volume signal at a time. All currently planned first- and second-batch atomic candidates are now either completed or in progress under the same frozen contract. No mixed score family, extraction tweak, turnover suppression, or cost-contract change is allowed inside this round.

research_question: Can a mixed price-volume family built only from the retained atomic signals discovered in rr_price_volume_single_signal_discovery_20260422 produce a stronger and more robust edge than calibrated v7 without reintroducing rejected signals?
notes: First constructed price-volume family after the single-signal discovery round. It uses only retained atomic signals (momentum_60_5, trend_consistency_20d, liquidity_trend_20_60), freezes the calibrated v7 operational contract, and excludes all rejected signals plus the borderline momentum_120_20 candidate. The completed first run improved annual_relative_return, relative_ir, and turnover versus calibrated v7, but max_drawdown worsened and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: Does removing trend_consistency_20d_raw from v15 produce a cleaner two-signal price-volume family that preserves v15's broad edge while improving head extraction robustness and reducing drawdown fragility?
notes: Strict ablation round that freezes the calibrated v7 operational contract and every v15 downstream rule, and changes exactly one thing: remove trend_consistency_20d_raw from the v15 family. The design is motivated by the v15 component ablation diagnosis, which showed stronger signal-layer readouts after removing trend_consistency_20d_raw. The first v16 run improved annual_relative_return, relative_ir, max_drawdown, turnover, and low-liquidity weight share versus v15, but both TopK perturbation and cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: Can a portfolio-extraction-only challenger keep the v16 two-signal family fixed but smooth capital allocation inside the selected head enough to reduce cutoff fragility, improve TopK robustness, and survive cost stress more cleanly?
notes: Strict extraction-only round that freezes the v16 score family, the calibrated v7 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, TopK width, execution semantics, benchmark, cost contract, and engineering defaults. The only intended change is to replace the hard equal-weight Top10 extraction with one deterministic head-smoothing rule. The first v17 run materially improved annual_relative_return, relative_ir, max_drawdown, and low-liquidity weight share versus v16, but turnover increased and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: Can a portfolio-refresh-only challenger keep the v17 two-signal family and head-extraction smoothing fixed, but add a mild incumbent-retention hysteresis that lowers turnover enough to improve cost robustness without giving back the extraction gains?
notes: Strict refresh-only round that freezes the v17 score family, the calibrated v7 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, TopK width, head-extraction smoothing, execution semantics, benchmark, cost contract, and engineering defaults. The only intended change is to add one mild retention band so incumbents are not replaced as aggressively across signal dates. The first v18 run slightly improved annual_relative_return, relative_ir, max_drawdown, and low-liquidity weight share versus v17, but it did not reduce turnover and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: Can a portfolio-extraction-only challenger keep the v17 two-signal family and the v17 head-extraction geometry fixed, but add one deterministic cross-date target-weight stability cap that reduces incumbent resize flow enough to improve cost robustness without giving back the extraction gains?
notes: Strict extraction-only round that freezes the v17 score family, the calibrated v7 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, TopK width, execution semantics, benchmark, cost contract, and engineering defaults. The only intended change is to add one deterministic absolute daily target-weight change cap inside the v17 smoothed head extraction so the round directly attacks incumbent-resize turnover rather than replacement flow. The first v19 run preserved the v17 profile and slightly improved max_drawdown plus low-liquidity weight share, but it did not reduce turnover, slightly worsened annual_relative_return and relative_ir, and still failed both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates.

research_question: Can a portfolio-extraction-only challenger freeze the v18 two-signal score family, calibrated liquidity guard, and top-15 refresh hysteresis, but replace continuous refreshed weights with one deterministic piecewise bucket extraction that reduces incumbent-resize churn enough to improve cost robustness without giving back the v17/v18 gains?
notes: Strict extraction-only round that freezes the v18 score family, calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, top-15 refresh hysteresis, TopK width, execution semantics, benchmark, cost contract, and engineering defaults. The only intended change is to replace equal-weight refreshed holdings with one deterministic piecewise bucket extraction so small within-bucket rank moves should not trigger as much incumbent resize flow. The first v20 run slightly improved annual_relative_return, relative_ir, and avg_turnover_daily versus v18, but max_drawdown worsened slightly, low-liquidity share ticked up, and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: After freezing v18 as the working reference, which additional atomic price-volume signals deserve entry into the next family-construction pool under the v18 operational contract, and which should be rejected before any new mixed family is built?
notes: Second price-volume discovery round opened only after freezing v18 as the working reference and pausing further portfolio-layer micro-tuning. This batch tested four smoother-horizon or inverse-direction atomic candidates and produced zero new clean positive keepers. The completed phase summary recommends continuing single-signal discovery rather than opening a new mixed family immediately.

research_question: After round 2 produced no new clean positive keeper under the frozen v18 operational contract, which additional atomic price-volume signals can expand the retained pool with truly complementary positive edge before any later family-construction round is reopened?
notes: Third price-volume discovery round opened only after round 2 completed with zero new clean positive keepers. This batch focused on complementary horizon variants around trend strength, trend consistency, and liquidity-improvement dynamics rather than revisiting already rejected raw liquidity-level or low-volatility-level hypotheses. The completed phase summary found exactly one new clean positive keeper, liquidity_trend_60_120_raw, and recommends reopening family construction via a direct substitution test rather than continuing another discovery-only expansion batch.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does replacing liquidity_trend_20_60_raw with the newly retained liquidity_trend_60_120_raw produce a cleaner and more robust mixed price-volume family than the current retained two-signal baseline line?
notes: Family-construction round reopened only after round 3 discovery produced one new clean positive keeper, liquidity_trend_60_120_raw. The completed first run showed that the direct substitution improved max_drawdown and avg_turnover_daily versus v18, but annual_relative_return and relative_ir worsened, low-liquidity weight share ticked up slightly, and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: After the direct family substitution test still failed to clear the audit gates, which new atomic price-volume signals from the orthogonal themes of breakout position, volume confirmation, candle-pressure structure, and path efficiency can expand the retained pool with genuinely complementary positive edge under the frozen v18 operational contract?
notes: Round 4 batch completed under the frozen v18 operational contract. Decision: continue_pool_expansion=false, reopen_family_construction=true.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does replacing liquidity_trend_20_60_raw with the newly retained breakout_volume_confirmation_20d_raw produce a cleaner and more robust mixed price-volume family than the current retained two-signal baseline line?
notes: The first v22 run completed with a fully passing run-state acceptance, but annual_relative_return, relative_ir, max_drawdown, turnover, cash usage, and low-liquidity exposure all worsened materially versus v18, while both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does amount_shock_5_20_raw look compositionally compatible with the current core two-signal family of momentum_60_5_raw plus liquidity_trend_20_60_raw, or would it likely destabilize head selection and portfolio path if promoted into a later family round?
notes: This round inserts a formal composability-screening layer between single-signal discovery and new family construction. The completed screen showed that amount_shock_5_20_raw improves several static score-layer diagnostics versus the frozen v18 core family, but additive monotonicity inside the high-core region is not clean and head stability deteriorates materially, so the composability verdict is mixed rather than cleanly promotable.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, can amount_shock_5_20_raw improve the core two-signal family only as a constrained gated overlay inside already-strong core-score regions, without repeating the instability that appeared in direct additive promotion?
notes: This round is opened after the amount_shock_5_20_raw composability screen returned a mixed verdict. The design purpose is to keep the v18 core family intact and only allow a small gated overlay bonus from amount_shock_5_20_raw inside already-strong core-score regions. The first v23 run lowered average turnover and cash weight versus v18, but annual_relative_return and max_drawdown worsened materially and both TopK perturbation plus cost-stress audit gates still failed. A first engineering run without frozen guard recognition was discarded. The corrected run under restored frozen-guard semantics still worsened annual_relative_return, relative_ir, and max_drawdown versus v18, while TopK perturbation and cost-stress audit gates both remained failed.

research_question: After pausing the current price-volume family tuning line because v22, the amount_shock composability screen, and v23 all failed to beat the frozen v18 working reference, which new orthogonal atomic price-volume signals from signed amount flow, turnover dynamics, price-volume synchronicity, path efficiency, range compression, failed-breakout pressure, and intraday recovery can expand the retained keeper pool before any later family-construction round is reopened?
notes: Round 5 batch completed under the frozen v18 operational contract. Decision: continue_pool_expansion=false, reopen_family_construction=true.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does volume_price_synchronicity_20d_raw look compositionally compatible with the current core two-signal family of momentum_60_5_raw plus liquidity_trend_20_60_raw, or would it likely destabilize head selection and portfolio path if promoted into a later family round?
notes: This round inserts the formal composability-screening layer between single-signal discovery and new family construction. The completed screen showed that volume_price_synchronicity_20d_raw materially improves static score-layer diagnostics versus the frozen v18 core family and passes additive monotonicity in the high-core bucket, but head stability still weakens and the screen also tilts toward a less liquid top10 proxy set, so the composability verdict is mixed rather than cleanly promotable.

research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, does up_amount_persistence_20d_raw look compositionally compatible with the current core two-signal family of momentum_60_5_raw plus liquidity_trend_20_60_raw, or would it likely destabilize head selection and portfolio path if promoted into a later family round?
notes: This round inserts the formal composability-screening layer between single-signal discovery and new family construction. The completed screen modestly improves several static score-layer diagnostics versus the frozen v18 core family, but the high-core interaction is not additive-monotonic, next-day top10 overlap weakens, and the top10 liquidity proxy also deteriorates, so the composability verdict is mixed rather than cleanly promotable.

research_question: After pausing the current price-volume family tuning line and deciding not to promote any round-5 keeper directly into a new family, which more standardized atomic price-volume signals inspired by Alpha158-style feature construction and common price-volume research can expand the retained keeper pool under the frozen v18 operational contract before any later family construction is reopened?

research_question: On the trainval-only snapshot that excludes the frozen 2022-2025 test window by construction, which one of three orthogonal Alpha158 standalone keepers cord30, vsumd60, and imxd5 can beat the frozen v18 working reference under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?
notes: confirmatory round completed on trainval-only snapshot; passed_candidate_count=1; round_decision=KEEP.

research_question: After round 1 selected Alpha158 VSUMD60 as the only passing standalone candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict confirmatory recheck based on frozen round-1 artifacts; no strategy rebuild, only stricter promotion rule.

research_question: After round 1 selected Alpha158 VSUMD60 as the only passing standalone candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict recheck completed on frozen round-1 artifacts; candidate passed stricter subperiod, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates.

research_question: After VSUMD60 passed confirmatory rounds 1 and 2 as a standalone Alpha158 atomic winner, can one restrained family seed that changes only the ranking eligibility guard improve tradability and cost robustness without giving back the confirmed standalone edge?
notes: First restrained VSUMD60 family seed registered. Score stays fixed on alpha158_vsumd60_raw; only a 0.70 ranking liquidity guard is introduced.

research_question: After VSUMD60 passed confirmatory rounds 1 and 2 as a standalone Alpha158 atomic winner, can one restrained family seed that changes only the ranking eligibility guard improve tradability and cost robustness without giving back the confirmed standalone edge?
notes: Seed round 1 completed. Liquidity guard70 improved turnover and low-liquidity exposure, but gave back too much standalone edge and worsened cost-stress annual relative return versus standalone VSUMD60.

research_question: After the guard-only VSUMD60 family seed failed, can a second restrained family seed that changes only the portfolio extraction rule improve benchmark-relative quality without giving back too much of the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 edge?
notes: Second restrained VSUMD60 family seed registered. Score stays fixed on alpha158_vsumd60_raw; only the portfolio extraction rule changes to linear rank decay over the frozen TopK head.

research_question: After the guard-only VSUMD60 family seed failed, can a second restrained family seed that changes only the portfolio extraction rule improve benchmark-relative quality without giving back too much of the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 edge?
notes: Seed round 2 completed. Linear rank-decay extraction was much closer than the guard-only seed, with only mild edge giveback and slightly better low-liquidity exposure, but it still failed the prereg gate versus standalone VSUMD60.

research_question: After the guard-only and extraction-only VSUMD60 family seeds both failed, can one final restrained family seed that changes only the weight mapping improve tradability and low-liquidity exposure without giving back the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 edge?
notes: Final restrained VSUMD60 family seed registered. Score stays fixed on alpha158_vsumd60_raw; only the internal weight mapping changes to a mild liquidity-rank tilt inside the frozen TopK.

research_question: After the guard-only and extraction-only VSUMD60 family seeds both failed, can one final restrained family seed that changes only the weight mapping improve tradability and low-liquidity exposure without giving back the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 edge?
notes: Seed round 3 completed. The mild liquidity-rank weight tilt slightly reduced low-liquidity exposure and marginally improved max_drawdown and turnover, but annual_relative_return, relative_ir, and cost_stress_annual_relative_return still remained worse than the standalone VSUMD60 reference.

research_question: Under the fixed walk-forward v1 annual deployment protocol, does the confirmed standalone Alpha158 VSUMD60 winner show enough 2022-2025 rolling deployment stability to justify continued research investment?
notes: First formal walk-forward execution for standalone VSUMD60 under the annual walk-forward v1 protocol on the full snapshot.

research_question: Under the fixed walk-forward v1 annual deployment protocol, does the confirmed standalone Alpha158 VSUMD60 winner show enough 2022-2025 rolling deployment stability to justify continued research investment?
notes: Walk-forward v1 completed. VSUMD60 achieved positive windows in 2 of 4 annual deployment slices, stitched annual_relative_return stayed positive, and stitched walk_forward_ir stayed above zero, so the candidate clears a continuation-grade gate but still fails the stricter formal framework walk-forward thresholds.

research_question: After freezing Alpha158 VSUMD60 as a reserve atomic keeper because its edge proved more bottom-avoidance than head-extraction under walk-forward, which one of three head-extraction oriented Alpha158 reserve cards corr20, corr30, and cord30 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?
notes: Head-extraction confirmatory shortlist registered after freezing VSUMD60 to reserve. This round keeps the candidate pool at three names and asks a narrower confirmatory question under the frozen trainval-only contract.

research_question: After freezing Alpha158 VSUMD60 as a reserve atomic keeper because its edge proved more bottom-avoidance than head-extraction under walk-forward, which one of three head-extraction oriented Alpha158 reserve cards corr20, corr30, and cord30 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?
notes: Head-extraction confirmatory shortlist completed on the trainval-only snapshot; corr30 was the only passing candidate. corr20 failed only because avg_invested_weight stayed below the 0.15 floor, while cord30 failed because avg_turnover_daily rose above the 0.02 tolerance versus the frozen v18 reference.

research_question: After round 2 selected Alpha158 CORR30 as the only passing head-extraction standalone candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict confirmatory recheck registered for the single passing head-extraction shortlist winner CORR30. No strategy artifacts are rebuilt; only the promotion rule becomes stricter.

research_question: After round 2 selected Alpha158 CORR30 as the only passing head-extraction standalone candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict confirmatory recheck completed. CORR30 preserved strong validation, subperiod, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation deltas versus the frozen v18 reference, but failed the strict gate because candidate_avg_invested_weight remained below the 0.18 floor.

research_question: After freezing VSUMD60 and CORR30 as reserve atomic keepers because neither graduated to a confirmatory mainline, which one of three higher-invested-weight oriented head-extraction Alpha158 reserve cards imxd5, cord30, and imax20 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?
notes: New confirmatory shortlist registered with a different problem definition: prioritize higher invested-weight head-extraction candidates instead of further polishing low-exposure reserve winners.

research_question: After freezing VSUMD60 and CORR30 as reserve atomic keepers because neither graduated to a confirmatory mainline, which one of three higher-invested-weight oriented head-extraction Alpha158 reserve cards imxd5, cord30, and imax20 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?
notes: Higher-invested-weight head-extraction shortlist completed on the trainval-only snapshot; cord30 was the only passing candidate under the widened turnover tolerance and the higher invested-weight floor. imxd5 and imax20 both showed strong return/IR/drawdown deltas versus v18, but failed because turnover rose above the 0.04 tolerance.

research_question: After round 4 selected Alpha158 CORD30 as the only passing higher-invested-weight head-extraction candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict confirmatory recheck registered for the single passing higher-invested-weight shortlist winner CORD30. No strategy artifacts are rebuilt; only the promotion rule becomes stricter.

research_question: After round 4 selected Alpha158 CORD30 as the only passing higher-invested-weight head-extraction candidate, does it still pass under a stricter confirmatory recheck that freezes the same trainval-only artifacts and tightens only the promotion rule through subperiod stability, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation gates?
notes: Strict confirmatory recheck completed. CORD30 preserved strong validation, subperiod, cost-stress, low-liquidity, and TopK-perturbation deltas versus the frozen v18 reference, but failed the strict gate because validation_avg_turnover_daily_delta remained above the 0.02 floor.

research_question: After Alpha158 CORD30 passed the higher-invested-weight confirmatory shortlist but failed strict recheck only because validation_avg_turnover_daily_delta remained above 0.02, can one turnover-control-only seed that changes only the cross-date portfolio refresh rule compress turnover back into the strict gate range without materially giving back CORD30's validated return, IR, drawdown, and invested-weight edge?
allowed_core_dimension: turnover control / portfolio refresh rule only
notes: Confirmatory family seed completed. pass_boolean=False. refresh_hysteresis15 turnover compression insufficient to meet strict gate thresholds.

research_question: After the Alpha158 confirmatory fine-tuning line was paused because CORD30 failed the final turnover-control-only follow-up, can one small dual-signal family built from the reserve head-extraction pair corr30 and cord30 smooth cross-sectional rank movement enough to reduce the structural turnover problem of single-signal TopK equal-weight selection, while preserving higher invested-weight head-extraction characteristics?
notes: New exploratory family-construction line registered after the Alpha158 confirmatory fine-tuning line was paused. This round tests only whether corr30 + cord30 score blending can reduce structural single-signal turnover under a frozen simple operating contract.

research_question: After the Alpha158 confirmatory fine-tuning line was paused because CORD30 failed the final turnover-control-only follow-up, can one small dual-signal family built from the reserve head-extraction pair corr30 and cord30 smooth cross-sectional rank movement enough to reduce the structural turnover problem of single-signal TopK equal-weight selection, while preserving higher invested-weight head-extraction characteristics?
notes: Exploratory dual-signal family completed. topk_perturbation_pass=false, cost_stress_pass=false.

research_question: 在 D1-D5 短持有系统 + TopK + 现金保留 + 不补位合同下，以非 Alpha158 的量价协同信号 (volume_price_synchronicity)、日内微观结构信号 (intraday_trend_bias)、秩相关信号 (price_volume_rank_corr) 构建的线性多信号基线，能否在年化相对收益、相对 IR、TopK 扰动稳定性上不低于 working reference (price_volume_v18_refresh_hysteresis) 50bp？
change_control_rule: single_dimension_only, 只允许在 baseline_reference 上新增指定信号，不允许改变 TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取、组合刷新、purge gap、样本资格矩阵
notes: 废弃。基于错误口径注册：v18 working reference 实际为 2 信号 (momentum + liquidity_trend)，非 5 信号。三个候选信号已在 exploratory rounds 5/7/11b 以 v18 为 baseline 测过单信号，composability screen 均返回 mixed。该 add-to-v18 方向已被 rounds 4-11b 系统性验证为走不通。替代方案见 rr_confirmatory_intraday_microstructure_independent_baseline_20260501。invalidated_due_to_reference_mismatch; superseded_by: rr_exploratory_intraday_microstructure_independent_baseline_20260501.

research_question: 在 D1-D5 短持有系统 + TopK + 现金保留 + 不补位合同下，以完全不包含 momentum 或 liquidity-trend 信号的日内微观结构信号 (intraday_trend_bias, upside_range_share, intraday_reversal_asymmetry) 构建的独立基线，能否在验证集（2019-2021）上通过 success rules？
registration_convention: spec-first, implementation-second: feature_preset 与 score_rule 已在注册时冻结，builder 的 SQL 实现尚待补齐后验证一致性。补齐前不跑实验。
notes: Exploratory family-construction round for intraday microstructure independent baseline. Tests whether intraday signals (trend bias, range share, reversal asymmetry) can form a viable standalone baseline without momentum or liquidity-trend signals. V18 reference metrics from validation_readout.json (validation set 2019-2021, n_days=730): annual_relative_return=-0.2748, relative_ir=-1.9034, max_drawdown=-0.3988, avg_turnover_daily=0.0757, avg_invested_weight=0.1554. All 3 candidates failed absolute return/IR/topk-perturbation/cost-stress gates. Passed delta-vs-v18 and drawdown/turnover gates. c3 best overall but still fail. Round archived as completed_intraday_family_not_viable.
change_control_detail: 完全替换 score family：从 v18 的 [momentum + liquidity_trend] 替换为 intraday microstructure signals。不允许改变：TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、组合刷新规则 (refresh hysteresis)、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard (0.70 ranking eligibility guard)。
conclusion: all three candidates failed prereg success rules; intraday independent baseline not viable under current contract

research_question: 在保持 score family 和所有其他合同要素不变的前提下，仅将 holding_cohort_count 从 auto-detected (26) 改为 fixed 5，intraday microstructure independent baseline 是否从 not viable 变为 viable（Layer A），以及在同一新合同下 intraday family 相对 contract-matched v18 是否更优（Layer B）？
change_detail: 只改变 holding_cohort_count 从 auto-detected 值改为 5（通过 build_portfolio_artifacts.py 的 --holding-cohort-count 参数）。不允许改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、组合刷新规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard、cash retention / no-replacement 规则。
serial_rule: 前一个 run 完成并汇报后，才允许进入下一个。不得并行，不得边改边跑。

relationship_to_previous_round.relationship: same score family, different capital allocation contract (parallel, not supersede)

notes: 4 runs completed. v18_ref_5cohort: contract-matched baseline (avg_inv_w=0.803). c1_5cohort: best cost-stress, 6/9. c2_5cohort: diluted c1, 6/9. c3_5cohort: best return/drawdown, 6/9. Turnover gate for c3 was PASS (not FAIL as originally mis-reported in inline script output). All candidates failed same 3 gates: absolute return, IR, cost_stress. Topk perturbation was fixed by 5-cohort contract (was FAIL under 26-cohort).
conclusion: 5-cohort contract improved intraday family from 5/9 to 6/9. Topk perturbation bottleneck materially relieved. Absolute return/IR and cost_stress still failed. Intraday family under 5-cohort is still not viable under prereg success rules.

research_question: intraday_trend_bias 在高成交量 regime 下（当日 raw amount > 过去 20 日中位数，排除当日）是否比无条件的 trend_bias 具有更好的 cost_stress 和绝对收益表现？volume gate 是否能让 trend_bias 从 6/9 推进到 9/9？
change_detail: 只添加一个 conditioning condition：当日 raw amount > 过去 20 日 raw amount 中位数（窗口不含当日，strict >）。gate 不满足时 model_score_D0 = NULL（stock-day 不参与排名，但保留在原始样本审计中）。所有其他要素不变：score family（intraday_trend_bias 单信号）、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取、组合刷新、purge gap、流动性 guard、holding_cohort_count(5)。

serial_execution.rule: 只运行 1 个候选（volume-gated trend_bias）。完成后统一判断。不并行，不中途开新分支。

notes: Volume gate (amount > 20d median) excluded 52.72% of stock-days. Cost stress worsened (-0.076 to -0.113) because fixed-slippage model does not reward liquidity filtering. Topk perturbation also worsened (0.106 to 0.062) due to reduced diversification. Round closed. Intraday microstructure standalone line is now closed across three attempts.
conclusion: volume-gated trend bias did not improve viability relative to ungated c1 under the same 5-cohort contract (6/9). Failed absolute return/IR/cost_stress. Same viability tier as ungated c1.

research_question: 在 5-cohort 合同下，以短持有期反转（reversal_5d）与中持有期动量（momentum_60_5）构建的跨频信号基线，能否在验证集（2019-2021）上通过 9 道 prereg success rules？反转+动量跨频组合是否优于至少一个单信号对照？
change_detail: 完全替换 score family。仅允许使用 reversal_5d_raw 和 momentum_60_5_raw。不允许改变：TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、组合刷新规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard(0.70)、holding_cohort_count(5)、cash retention/no-replacement。
serial_rule: 三个候选在 prereg 时一次性冻结。运行顺序为串行，但非级联淘汰（前一个的结果不影响后一个的运行）。不允许根据 c1/c2 结果临时改 c3 定义。
c3_outperformance_rule: c3（反转+动量跨频组合）在通过 core_pass_condition 的前提下，还须在 annual_relative_return 或 cost_stress 中至少一项上优于 c1 和 c2 中至少一个单信号候选。
notes: Round closed. Cross-horizon price-based technical signals failed under 5-cohort. Together with intraday standalone line (3 rounds), the 5-cohort technical-price signal direction is now closed.
conclusion: All 3 candidates failed prereg success rules. c3 (reversal+momentum) showed combination buffering (best of three at -0.397 return) but still far from viable. Topk_perturbation and cost_stress were severe bottlenecks under 5-cohort high-invested-weight contract.

research_question: Plumbing validation: verify fundamental builder full-chain compatibility under 5-cohort contract.
notes: Plumbing validation only. Not a formal research round. Used to verify build_run_state_skeleton registry guardrail.

research_question: 在 5-cohort 合同下，以基本面 quality/profitability 信号（ROE, ROA 等 PIT 财务比率）构建的独立基线，能否在验证集（2019-2021）上通过 9 道 prereg success rules？基本面信号的低换手特性是否能解决 cost_stress 瓶颈？
change_detail: 从价格类技术信号完全替换为基本面 quality/profitability 信号（来自 fina_indicator_pit 的 PIT 财务数据）。不允许改变：TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、组合刷新规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard(0.70)、holding_cohort_count(5)、cash retention/no-replacement。
serial_rule: 三个候选在 prereg 时一次性冻结。运行顺序为串行，但非级联淘汰（前一个的结果不影响后一个的运行）。不允许根据 c1/c2 结果临时改 c3 定义。
notes: Fundamental quality/profitability signal family under 5-cohort contract. PIT data from fina_indicator_pit with ASOF join on pit_available_date. Baseline: exploratory_cohort5_v18_ref (contract-matched). This round opens a new direction after technical-price signal line was closed (4 rounds).
conclusion: all three candidates failed prereg success rules. Best: c1_roe_dt at 6/9. c3 combination did not improve robustness (4/9) and worsened topk stability and cost_stress. Low-turnover fundamental intuition did not translate into lower realized turnover under percentile-rank portfolio system.

research_question: 在 5-cohort + intraday trend_bias + TopK framework 下，仅将 portfolio_refresh_rule 从 daily_full_refresh 改为 top15_retention_band，能否在保持 return/IR/invested_weight 的前提下，将 turnover 从 0.39 压到 ≤0.20，使 cost_stress >= 0.00？
change_detail: 仅改变 portfolio_refresh_rule：从 daily_full_refresh 改为 retain_if_rank_leq_15。不允许改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard、holding_cohort_count(5)、cash retention/no-replacement。
baseline_reference_candidate_scheme_id: exploratory_cohort5_c1_trendbias_only (formal baseline, same signal, same 5-cohort, daily full refresh)

refresh_rule_definition.target_weight_rule: equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash

serial_rule: 方法轮，非信号轮。只允许 1 条主线（top15_retention_band），只允许 1 个 anchor signal（intraday trend_bias）。不并行展开 refresh rule 家族。不改任何信号代码或合同参数。
notes: Method round: tests whether portfolio_refresh_rule change alone can reduce turnover and pass cost_stress. Builds on break_even_cost_budget analysis. Turnover gate replaced from delta to absolute (<= 0.20). Formal delta baseline: c1 full refresh. Secondary diagnostic: v18.
conclusion: retention mechanism showed partial positive evidence. Return and drawdown improved (+0.058, +0.054). Turnover target failed (0.399 vs 0.20 target). retention unchanged. Root cause: retain_if_rank_leq=15 too narrow under 4311-name universe. Daily equal-weight rebalancing itself remains a turnover source.

research_question: 在 retain15 已验证 retention 有正效应的前提下，将 retain_if_rank_leq 从 15 放宽到 50，是否能显著提高 incumbent 保留比例、压缩 turnover 到 ≤0.20，并使 cost_stress 接近或达到 ≥0.00？
change_detail: 仅改变 portfolio_refresh_rule 的 retain_if_rank_leq 参数：15 → 50。不允许改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard、holding_cohort_count(5)、cash retention/no-replacement。
baseline_note: formal baseline — same signal, same contract, retain15 (the immediate predecessor)

portfolio_refresh_contract.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.

serial_rule: 方法轮第二回合。只改 retain_if_rank_leq: 15→50。不改 signal、contract、refresh type。不开并行分支。
notes: Wider retention band round. retain15 proved retention has positive effects. This round tests whether widening the window (15→50) increases retention rate enough to reduce turnover to ≤0.20.
conclusion: wider retention band improved return and drawdown further but failed to reduce turnover at all. Turnover converged to ~0.399 across full refresh/retain15/retain50. Current daily-recheck retention semantics do not alter the structural turnover regime.

research_question: 将 portfolio_refresh_rule 从 daily-recheck 改为 cohort-entry locked（持仓按 cohort 启动时的 rank 锁定 5 天，不再每日重检），是否能在保持 return/drawdown 的前提下，将 turnover 从 ~0.40 压缩到 <=0.20，并使 cost_stress 通过？
change_detail: 将 portfolio_refresh_rule 从 daily-recheck 替换为 cohort-entry locked。持仓在 cohort 启动时做一次 rank 检查（使用当前 TopK 选出的持仓），通过后锁定持有至该 cohort 的 D5 自然到期。锁定期间不因每日 rank 变化被替换。持仓退出条件仅限：自然到期(D5)/不可交易退出(停牌/退市)/终止事件。空出的槽位保留现金，不补位。不允许改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard、holding_cohort_count(5)、cash retention/no-replacement。
baseline_note: formal baseline — same signal, same 5-cohort contract, daily full refresh

portfolio_refresh_contract.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.
portfolio_refresh_contract.semantic_note: Rank is checked exactly once at cohort start. Holdings that pass entry check are locked until D5. Daily rank changes have zero effect on holdings during the lock period.

serial_rule: Portfolio_refresh_rule 方向的最终测试。如果 cohort-entry locked 仍然无法将 turnover 压到 0.20 以下，该方向正式关闭。不开并行分支。
notes: Prereg was frozen before discovering that (a) cohort_entry_locked shares SQL with full refresh, so no behavioral change; (b) turnover <= 0.20 is mathematically impossible under 5-cohort + D5 hold + 0.81 invested weight due to structural daily cohort exit flow. Replaced by design_note_turnover_floor_analysis.md.
conclusion: method-definition invalid: cohort_entry_locked as implemented is equivalent to full refresh (same TopK-per-signal-date selection, same D5 hold). Turnover target (<=0.20) is infeasible under 5-cohort contract: structural floor = 2 × 0.81 / 5 ≈ 0.324.

research_question: 将 holding_cohort_count 从 5 改为 10，是否能将 turnover floor 从 0.324 压缩到 ~0.20-0.25 的可达区间？同时保持 invested_weight 不崩溃（>= 0.30）？
change_detail: 唯一变化：holding_cohort_count 5→10。不改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、refresh rule(保留 full refresh)、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard。
notes: Contract-feasibility round. Tests whether cohort_count=10 alone reduces turnover to ≤0.25 while preserving inv_wt ≥ 0.30.

research_question: 在 10-cohort 合同下（turnover 已降至 0.199，feasibility 已验证），加入 retain50 daily-recheck refresh rule，能否在保持 turnover <= 0.25 和 invested_weight >= 0.30 的前提下，改善 return/IR/drawdown 和 cost_stress？
change_detail: 在 10-cohort 合同下，将 refresh rule 从 full refresh 改为 daily-recheck retain_if_rank_leq=50。
notes: Retain50 applied under 10-cohort contract. Daily-recheck semantics. Formal baseline: exploratory_cohort10_c1_trendbias_only.
conclusion: 10-cohort solved turnover feasibility. retain50 improved return/drawdown vs 10-cohort full refresh. But all 4 configurations (5C_full/5C_R50/10C_full/10C_R50) still failed the same 3 gates: annual_relative_return, relative_ir, cost_stress. Portfolio_refresh_rule + holding_cohort_count search is near exhausted under current framework.

research_question: 在 10-cohort full refresh + 当前 cost_stress 模型下，理论上可实现的最强排序信息（未来 5 日持有期真实收益）能否通过 cost_stress >= 0？
change_detail: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — 使用 label_5d_next_open_close（未来真实收益）作为 oracle ranking signal。其余全部冻结：10-cohort full refresh, TopK=10, 标准 cost/execution/benchmark。这不是可交易策略，不是研究候选。
notes: Framework diagnostic probe. Uses future 5d return as oracle signal. Answer: is cost_stress >= 0 structurally feasible under current framework? Not a tradable strategy, not a research candidate.

research_question: 仅将 holding period 从 D5 延长到 D10，是否能显著缓解 execution-feasibility gap？
notes: Framework redesign: D10 holding period. Directly addresses execution-feasibility gap.
conclusion: D10 planned_exit_date patch at run_state layer is ineffective. build_portfolio_artifacts.py consumes planned_exit_date from project_execution_panel.parquet (data layer), not from run_state output. Therefore D10 requires data-layer implementation, not run-state patching. Round invalidated pending data-layer fix.

research_question: 将日收益率拆解为隔夜和日内成分后，单独或与 p98 复合是否能产出超越 p98 baseline (IC 0.046) 的信号？
notes: V2 direction-corrected features from learnability diagnostic. Overnight component is orthogonal (corr 0.18 with p98) but weak (IC 0.014). Intraday component drives p98 (corr 0.86). Testing full-chain performance.

round_decision_rationale: All 11 candidates (6 v1 + 5 v2) failed to beat p98 baseline in both learnability diagnostic and full-chain fixed test. Overnight component is orthogonal (corr 0.18) but too weak (IC 0.014). Intraday component IS p98 (corr 0.86). Decomposition confirms mechanism but provides no improvement.
notes: Consistent with local feature space exhaustion thesis. Recommend new data modality for next phase.
4-signal equal-weight composite achieves +93% validation IC vs p98, +51% Sharpe, +32% cost stress improvement. Best non-oracle result in project history.
